use serde::Deserialize;
use validator::Validate;

#[derive(Debug, Deserialize, Validate)]
pub struct {{ struct_name }} {
    /// Example field — replace with your DTO.
    #[validate(length(min = 1, message = "is required"))]
    pub title: String,
}
